# bowtie_device_group (Data Source)

Look up an existing device group by name, for example to reference its ID in a policy source (`device_group`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "bowtie_device_group" "corporate_laptops" {
  name = "Corporate Laptops"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the device group to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the device group.
- `id` (String) Internal device group ID.
